member.name: T:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1
member.summary: Represents a generic doubly linked list where elements are added to the end. Supports enumeration via foreach, index-based read access, and removal by index.
member.typeparam: The type of elements stored in the list. Must implement for comparison-based operations.

member.name: F:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1._head
member.summary: Reference to the first node (head) of the list.

member.name: F:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1._tail
member.summary: Reference to the last node (tail) of the list.

member.name: F:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1._count
member.summary: The number of elements currently in the list.

member.name: P:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of elements currently stored in the list.

member.name: P:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.IsEmpty
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the list is empty.

member.name: M:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.AddToEnd(`0)
member.summary: Adds a new element with the specified value to the end of the list.
member.param: The value to add to the list.

member.name: P:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the element at the specified zero-based index (counting from the head).
member.param: The zero-based index of the element to retrieve.
member.returns: The element at the specified index.
member.exception: Thrown when is negative or greater than or equal to .

member.name: M:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.RemoveAt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes the element at the specified zero-based index (counting from the head).
member.param: The zero-based index of the element to remove.
member.exception: Thrown when is negative or greater than or equal to .

member.name: M:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.FindFirstOccurrence(`0)
member.summary: Finds the zero-based index of the first occurrence of the specified value, searching from the head of the list.
member.returns: The zero-based index of the first occurrence if found; otherwise -1.

member.name: M:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.SumAtOddPositions
member.summary: Calculates the sum of elements located at odd positions in the list. Positions are counted with 1-based numbering starting from the head, so odd positions are 1, 3, 5, …
member.returns: The sum of elements at odd positions as a . Returns 0 if the list is empty.

member.name: M:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.GetListGreaterThan(`0)
member.summary: Creates and returns a new containing only the elements from this list whose values are strictly greater than the specified threshold.
member.param: The threshold value to compare each element against.
member.returns: A new list with all elements greater than , preserving the original order.

member.name: M:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.RemoveGreaterThanAverage
member.summary: Removes all elements from the list whose values are strictly greater than the arithmetic mean (average) of all elements in the list. The average is computed before any removal takes place.
member.exception: Thrown when the list is empty.

member.name: M:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through the list from head to tail. Enables use of the foreach statement.
member.returns: An enumerator over the elements of this list.

member.name: M:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the list in the format [a <-> b <-> c], or [empty] when the list has no elements.
member.returns: A human-readable string describing the list contents.

member.name: M:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.ComputeAverage
member.summary: Computes the arithmetic mean of all elements in the list.
member.returns: The average value of the elements as a .

member.name: M:DoublyLinkedListLib.DoublyLinkedList`1.ValidateIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that the given index is within the bounds of the list.
member.exception: Thrown when the index is negative or greater than or equal to .

member.name: T:DoublyLinkedListLib.Node`1
member.summary: Represents a single node in a doubly linked list. Each node stores a data value and references to the previous and next nodes.
member.typeparam: The type of data stored in the node.

member.name: P:DoublyLinkedListLib.Node`1.Data
member.summary: Gets or sets the data value stored in this node.

member.name: P:DoublyLinkedListLib.Node`1.Next
member.summary: Gets or sets the reference to the next node in the list. null if this node is the tail.

member.name: P:DoublyLinkedListLib.Node`1.Previous
member.summary: Gets or sets the reference to the previous node in the list. null if this node is the head.

member.name: M:DoublyLinkedListLib.Node`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with the specified data value.
member.param: The data value to store in the node.
